title: Rhythm: build muscle memory
description: Rhythm exercise — combine all learned keys in a smooth flowing text
text: she said he is here she likes red dresses had a fair ride
finger_focus: All keys learned — focus on rhythm
tips: Don't stop between words — keep a steady pace
If you slow down, that's fine — accuracy first
Real sentence! She said he is here she likes red dresses had a fair ride

character_tips.anna: Ритм-урок! Не цели в скорость — найди плавный ритм. Музыкально печатай.
character_tips.maxim: Ровный темп. Каждый символ — клик. Не торопись, не тормози.
